configuration.copywriter_attribution: John Whitehead / Media Services / Bio Tech Research

r_relatable_problem.primary_problem: Pain relief requires either dangerous drugs or is slow to work
relatability_triggers: A product that relieves pain in 10 minutes without taking dangerous drugs has been used safely in Japan for 71 years.

s_specific_solution.core_mechanism: : This particular Oriental pain relief method was brought to market commercially by a Japanese pharmaceutical company in 1934. They took the ingredients that brought the pain relief from the Oriental medicine remedies and put them in a remarkable patch. This patch has the ingredients in very advanced forms of fiber. When the patch is applied, the ingredients are released over a long period of time through the skin deeply into the muscles, bones and joints to the source of the pain. The ingredients cool and reduce inflammation. Then the ingredients gently warm the damaged area deep to muscles, joints and bones. The natural response of the body to the increased temperature is to try to maintain homeostasis. Therefore, it expands blood vessels to increase blood flow. Oxygen and nutrients in the bloodstream pass through more easily and carry toxins away from the damaged tissue.
mechanism_proof_points: 71 years of safe use in Japan (since 1934)
John Whitakre, Chief of Staff, Product Development, Bio Tech Research
unique_differentiators: 71-year commercial safety record in Japan, now available in US

lead.hook_sentence: A product that relieves pain in 10 minutes without taking dangerous drugs has been used safely in Japan for 71 years.
lead.full_text: A product that relieves pain in 10 minutes without taking dangerous drugs has been used safely in Japan for 71 years. It is now available in the United States. This product is a patch that contains ingredients that not only relieve pain quickly, but, also help remove toxins from the damaged area. It can cut your pain relief costs up to 90% less than taking pain relief drugs. This product is being offered in the United States by Biotech Research under its brand name of PainNOT Patches.

mechanism.explanation_text: This particular Oriental pain relief method was brought to market commercially by a Japanese pharmaceutical company in 1934. They took the ingredients that brought the pain relief from the Oriental medicine remedies and put them in a remarkable patch. This patch has the ingredients in very advanced forms of fiber. When the patch is applied, the ingredients are released over a long period of time through the skin deeply into the muscles, bones and joints to the source of the pain. The ingredients cool and reduce inflammation. Then the ingredients gently warm the damaged area deep to muscles, joints and bones. The natural response of the body to the increased temperature is to try to maintain homeostasis. Therefore, it expands blood vessels to increase blood flow. Oxygen and nutrients in the bloodstream pass through more easily and carry toxins away from the damaged tissue.

promise_architecture.competitive_positioning: Japanese proven safety vs. dangerous COX-2 drugs (heart attacks/strokes)

three_part_structure.what_they_think: Pain relief requires either dangerous drugs or is slow to work
three_part_structure.what_it_really_is: Oriental medicine delivers fast relief without systemic drug exposure
three_part_structure.why_nothing_worked: Ingestible drugs go through liver causing side effects, don't target pain source

villain_profile.villain_mechanism: COX-2 enzyme is necessary for cardiovascular health, drugs that eliminate it cause heart attacks and strokes

root_cause_architecture.blame_transfer: From 'pain is unavoidable' to 'wrong delivery method (systemic vs. topical)'

narrative_reorganization.self_blame_removal: High - previous methods were dangerous, not your fault
narrative_reorganization.coherence_creation: Connects direct-to-pain delivery with both safety and speed
narrative_reorganization.new_self_concept: Person who found safe, proven alternative to dangerous drugs

proof_elements.verbatim_text: This product has one of the longest records of real life safety measurement. It has been used safely for 71 years.

I honestly did not expect much in the way of results, because I had already tried sports creams and also an elbow sleeve that has a sports cream in the sleeve. Neither worked at all. That's why I was surprised when the PainNOT patch actually took the pain away! They worked so well that I almost forgot I had been in pain.

The doctor told me that I needed surgery for my back but I did not want to go through that. Now when I feel pain in my back I use the PainNOT Patch. In 10 minutes I start experiencing movement in my back again and even the next day my back feels wonderful.

I have had pain since last year on top of my hand behind the thumb, most likely caused from golf plus bone inflammation or arthritis. Up until now, I've only used Naproxen. PainNOT Patch has worked great for me. I wear the PainNOT patch when I play golf, and it stays on very well.
I had tried pain relievers and medicated creams and I just couldn't get relief. I tried the PainNOT Patch and it started to soothe my back almost immediately.
This product carries a 60 day unconditional, no-risk guarantee. If you are not totally satisfied, your purchase price will be refunded. No questions asked.

story_architecture.protagonist: Japanese pharmaceutical company (1934) + individual testimonial givers
story_architecture.story_text: This particular Oriental pain relief method was brought to market commercially by a Japanese pharmaceutical company in 1934. But they took it a step further. They took the ingredients that brought the pain relief from the Oriental medicine remedies and put them in a remarkable patch.
story_architecture.emotional_arc: ancient wisdom → modern innovation → proven safety → now accessible
story_architecture.lesson_or_moral: Time-tested solutions from other cultures can provide safe alternatives

metadata.source_file: Product used in Japan for 71 years relieves pain in 10 minutes 2005-2007 (4 Stars).md
metadata.extraction_notes: Classic origin marketing (Japan 71 years). Pain patch vs dangerous drugs positioning. Q&A interview format. COX-2 inhibitor countersell. 10-minute speed claim. Bio Tech Research. Multiple testimonials. 10-day discount deadline.

fssit_candidates.text: The doctor told me that I needed surgery for my back but I did not want to go through that
fssit_candidates.emotional_core: Finally, an alternative to scary surgery

fssit_candidates.text: I honestly did not expect much in the way of results, because I had already tried sports creams
fssit_candidates.emotional_core: Finally, something that works for skeptics

rsf_analysis.fssit_placement_pattern: FSSIT moments in testimonials expressing skepticism overcome and surgery avoidance

temporal_analysis.cultural_moment_reference: COX-2 drug recall crisis (Vioxx, etc.), Oriental medicine interest

extraction_quality.notes: Excellent origin marketing ad. 71 years in Japan creates unassailable safety credibility. COX-2 countersell brilliant timing given Vioxx scandal era. Q&A format with Chief of Staff adds authority. Multiple testimonials cover different pain types and compare to other failed solutions. Mike Blubaugh surgery alternative testimonial is particularly powerful. The vasodilation/homeostasis mechanism explanation adds scientific credibility. 90% cost savings appeals to value-conscious buyers.

metaphor_excellence.metaphor: None prominent - relies on origin story and mechanism education
